title: Contestation
description: A formal record of a dispute against an existing claim. Contestations are preserved, never silenced. Used in Layer 2 (Sovereign Knowledge Mode) and Layer 3 (Dispute Resolution).

contestation_id.description: Unique identifier for this contestation record

target_claim_id.description: ID of the claim being contested

contested_by.description: Actor or agent who raised the contestation

contestation_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the contestation was filed

grounds.description: The reason or basis for contesting the claim

counter_evidence.description: Optional: alternative evidence or source supporting the contestation

status.description: Current lifecycle status of this contestation

resolution_id.description: ID of the arbitration or audit event that resolved this contestation, if applicable

resolution_summary.description: Brief description of how this contestation was resolved, if applicable

resolved_by.description: Actor or agent who closed this contestation

resolved_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the contestation was resolved
